hassio_confirm.title: Discovered HA Claude Agent Add-on
hassio_confirm.description: The HA Claude Agent add-on was found at {addon_url}. Click submit to set up the integration.

user.title: Set up HA Claude Agent
user.description: Enter the add-on connection details. The defaults work for HAOS installations.

data_description.addon_host: Hostname or IP of the HA Claude Agent add-on container.
data_description.addon_port: Port the add-on HTTP server listens on.

abort.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the add-on. Is it installed and running?

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the add-on at this address. Is it installed and running?

data_description.name: Name of this conversation agent.
data_description.chat_model: Claude model to use for responses.
data_description.max_tokens: Maximum number of tokens in the response.
data_description.temperature: Controls randomness. Lower is more focused, higher is more creative.
data_description.thinking_effort: How much reasoning effort Claude uses. Higher means slower but more thorough.
data_description.max_turns: Maximum number of tool-use round trips per conversation turn.
data_description.prompt: Custom instructions for the AI agent. Appended to the HA context.
